summary: Senior ML engineer with 7 years of applied work spanning ranking, recommendations, and lately retrieval-augmented LLM pipelines. Comfortable owning the model-serving boundary.

highlights: Built a retrieval-augmented chat assistant for the support team; reduced ticket resolution time 35%.
Stood up vLLM serving for an internal 13B model behind an OpenAI-compatible API.
Owned the eval harness — pairwise human comparisons + LLM-judge with calibration.
Re-ranked the top-100 search results with a learned-to-rank model; CTR up 8%.
Migrated the feature store from cron-driven to Airflow + an online Redis layer.

projects.name: SupportRAG
projects.description: RAG pipeline over 200k internal docs; uses bge-base embeddings, FAISS HNSW index, and a reranker; serves through a small vLLM cluster.

projects.name: RankerV3
projects.description: Learned-to-rank model on top of search candidate generation; trained with LightGBM.
